title: Location Offering Filter
description: Filter criteria for location offerings, separating static amenities/services from dynamic inventory.

amenities.description: Filter by static services, amenities, or capabilities of the location (e.g., 'free_wifi', 'wheelchair_accessible', 'parking', 'curbside_pickup'). Matches locations that have ALL the listed amenities (AND logic).

inventory.description: Filter by real-time availability of inventory (e.g., retail products or restaurant dishes) at the location. Matches locations that have ALL the listed items in stock (AND logic).
